pois.description: [NOT CURRENTLY ACCESSIBLE] Nyx I is a coreless planet that orbits closest to the sun in the Nyx system. Once considered impossible to terraform, Nyx I has undergone a drastic transformation thanks to new experimental technology developed by Genesis Terraforming.
[NOT CURRENTLY ACCESSIBLE] A high-pressure atmosphere and thick clouds of acid and carbon dioxide make Nyx II not worth terraforming. \n
[NOT CURRENTLY ACCESSIBLE] Nyx III is an ice giant that lacks a breathable atmosphere or any valuable minerals. \n
[ CLOSED ] This logistics station is operated by QV Planetary Systems.
This jump point connects Nyx to the UEE controlled Castra system.
This jump point connects Nyx to the Pyro system.

This mining facility was abandoned for years before UEE refugees took up residence. Dedicated to the creation of an egalitarian society, Levski has evolved into a self-sustaining port of political activists and those wishing to escape the eye of the Empire.

This mining facility was abandoned for years before UEE refugees took up residence. Dedicated to creating an egalitarian society, this group of activists wanted to build the kind of community that the Messers had taken away. Levski has evolved into a self-sustaining port of political activists and those wishing to escape the eye of the Empire.
A small group of asteroids that share orbital characteristics.

Where fast and reliable medical treatment is always what the doctor ordered.
Where fast and reliable medical treatment is always what the doctor ordered.

Situated at a strategic location near the jump point to Stanton, the Gateway station provides shops and services to those traveling to and from Nyx. Visitors to the station can find a wide variety of amenities and stores including: Refueling, Restocking, Cargo Transfers, Personal Weapons, Personal Armor, Clothing, Food, a Clinic, Habs, and more. (TEMPORARY)

Situated at a strategic location near the jump point to Pyro, the Gateway station provides shops and services to those traveling to and from Nyx. Visitors to the station can find a wide variety of amenities and stores including: Refueling, Restocking, Cargo Transfers, Personal Weapons, Personal Armor, Clothing, Food, a Clinic, Habs, and more.
